name: flux-canny-pro
description: Professional edge-guided image generation. Control structure and composition using Canny edge detection

control_image.description: Image to use as control input. Must be jpeg, png, gif, or webp.
control_image.title: Control Image

guidance.description: Controls the balance between adherence to the text as well as image prompt and image quality/diversity. Higher values make the output more closely match the prompt but may reduce overall image quality. Lower values allow for more creative freedom but might produce results less relevant to the prompt.
guidance.title: Guidance

prompt_upsampling.description: Automatically modify the prompt for more creative generation
prompt_upsampling.title: Prompt Upsampling

safety_tolerance.description: Safety tolerance, 1 is most strict and 6 is most permissive
safety_tolerance.title: Safety Tolerance

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation
seed.title: Seed

steps.description: Number of diffusion steps. Higher values yield finer details but increase processing time.
steps.title: Steps
